title: Mystic Frontiers
description: Combat, magic and exploration. 9 classes, 60+ bosses. Overhauled terrain and graphics.
body:
**4-6GB allocated RAM needed!!!** ## Description and features Mystic Frontiers includes a carefully curated selection of mods, offering reworked combat, RPG progression, multiple bosses, unique weapons, and overhauled world generation. Explore deadly dungeons, uncover hidden treasures, forge and wield powerful gear, master magical abilities, face legendary creatures and shape your character’s journey. ### ⚔️ Enhanced Combat, Weapons & Spells Fluid combat animations, dodge rolls, custom weaponry, and a versatile magic system. (**Better Combat, Simply Swords, Iron’s Spells 'n Spellbooks, and more**)
### 🧙 Class Progression & Magical Gear Forge your own path with 18 RPG-inspired classes, leveling up stats to shape your abilities and combat style. Harness powerful spells, equip magical jewelry, and enhance your arsenal with unique weapons, modular tools, and custom-crafted gear. (**RPG Series, Just Leveling, Enigmatic Legacy, Icarus, and many others**)
### 🏰 Exploration, Structures & Dungeons Discover hundreds of dungeons, fortified villages, ancient ruins, and hidden treasures scattered across overhauled biomes, dimensions, and world generation. (**Terralith, Tectonic, Incendium, Nullscape, Deeper and Darker, YUNG's Structures, and many more**)
### 📦 Custom Content Quests to introduce main mods and features, datapacks created for mod integration and balancing, custom keyboard layout and multiple mod configurations set for the best experience and performance.
The quest lines available are: - **Path of Power**: Shows how you can become stronger, with classes, spells and weapons. Also has a mini tutorial on some of the relevant keys. - **Dragon Hunter**: related to the Ice and Fire mod, for fighting dragons, creating dragon equipment and also taming them. - **Uncharted Frontiers**: related to exploration, for creating essential travel gear, the new coin currency, flying airships and sailing ships, and discovering all dimensions. - **Apex Predator**: Defeating all of the 60+ high quality bosses and mini-bosses available, with instructions on how to find each of them. ### 🐉 Diverse Creatures, Mobs & Bosses Encounter unique monsters, rare tamable creatures, and 60+ powerful bosses and minibosses. (**Ice and Fire, Mowzie’s Mobs, L_Ender’s Cataclysm, Mythic Mounts, Bosses of Mass Destruction, Aquamirae, Legendary Monsters, The Cardinal Sins**)
### 🌀 Better Movement & Mobility Wall run, climb walls, glide with wings, and pilot immersive aircraft or sail large ships to traverse the world with ease. (**ParCool, Small Ships, Immersive Aircraft, Do a Barrel Roll**)
### ✨ Visual & Performance Upgrades Built in shaders, Improved UI, realistic physics, dynamic lighting, smooth animations, and optimized rendering. (**Embeddium, Distant Horizons, Oculus, Fresh Animations, among other enhancements**)
### 🛠️ Quality of Life Enhancements Smart inventory management, useful UI tweaks, better villager interactions, automations and mechanics that streamline gameplay. (**Inventory Sorter, Mouse Tweaks, Trading Post, JEI, Xaero’s Minimap, Ping Wheel and others**)
## Getting started Check the questline "Path to Power" by pressing J. In there, the main features are explained. There are a few more questlines to explore. Make sure to also check the default keybinds my pressing "K". ## Other info For the full mod list on Mystic Frontiers, check this [Google Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SSq1ETZdG2Da8c3F199cAPzELVFzXcPvyIIWQNAN0wc/edit?usp=sharing). To host a server, use the [server pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mystic-frontiers-server). Have problems or suggestions? [open an issue](https://github.com/joaovitorborges/Mystic-Frontiers-Modpack/issues).
Requirements and Performance Mystic Frontiers is a big modpack. Even without shaders, you need a decent CPU and at least 8GB of ram. | **Minecraft Version** | **Forge Version** | **Allocated RAM** | |:--------------------:|:--------------:|:----------------:| | 1.20.1 | 47.4.0 | 4-6 GB* | *Depends on graphics / resourcepacks / shaders / distant horizons settings If you are struggling with performance: - **Turn off Shaders**: Options > Video Settings > Oculus - **Lower render distance**: Options > Video settings > general - **Disable distant horizons**: Options > colored button on top left > Enable rendering to off
External mods credits This modpack includes the following third-party mods not hosted on Modrinth: - [Tetranomicon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tetranomicon) by [syrikalis](https://www.curseforge.com/members/syrikalis/projects) - [Cosmetic armor reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) by [LainMI](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lainmi/projects) - [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture) by [Shadow](https://www.curseforge.com/members/shadow/projects) - [Enemy Expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enemy-expansion) by [InfernalStudios](https://www.curseforge.com/members/infernalstudios/projects) - [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos) by [Mongoose_Artist](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mongoose_artist/projects)
